offer: For law firm partners processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient client engagement tracking causes missed billing opportunities. We provide reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track client engagement effectively leads to missed billing opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm partners
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm partners with demo video
Community forums for law firm partners sharing tools
try_it: Let users try client engagement tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
